items.title: Jantar Mantar protest a trailer, Pradhan must resign in seven days: Cockroach Janta Party founder Dipke
items.summary: Mr. Dipke also said their protest at Jantar Mantar in New Delhi on Saturday (June 6) was largely successful, with around 7,000 people participating in it, and added that the mov...

items.title: Residents' health fears over plan to burn more waste
items.summary: The Environment Agency has permitted for an extra 10% of waste to be burned at the Beddington incinerator.
items.whyItMatters: World and politics stories can shift public priorities, safety context, and what people need to understand next.

items.title: Despite Protest, Ye Takes the Stage for Thousands of European Fans
items.summary: Nearly 40,000 fans came out to hear the rapper formerly known as Kanye West in the Netherlands on Saturday, even as other European countries had canceled his concerts.
